error_msg:
Json Decode Error when decoding: {
    "reasoning": "The request requires generating a SystemVerilog interface and a significantly improved golden testbench. The module to test is `TopModule`, which implements a D Flip-Flop with active high synchronous reset.\n\n**1. Interface Generation:**\n- The golden testbench instantiates `TopModule` using ports: `clk` (input), `d` (input), `r` (input), and `q` (output). All ports must be declared as `logic`.\n- The interface is constructed exactly matching this usage, fulfilling the requirement to follow the golden testbench structure over the potentially simpler input specification.\n\n**2. Testbench Improvement (Sequential Logic Implementation):**\n- Since `TopModule` is sequential logic, the queue-based mismatch reporting mechanism is mandatory.\n- **Queue Setup:** Queues (`input_queue`, `got_output_queue`, `golden_queue`, `reset_queue`) are initialized. `MAX_QUEUE_SIZE` is set to 10, respecting the constraint.\n- **Data Capture:** Inside the clock edge block, the inputs (`{d, r}`), `q_dut`, `q_ref`, and the reset signal `r` are pushed onto their respective queues.\n- **Verification Logic:** The match condition (`tb_match`) is derived from the golden testbench's complex XOR logic, which simplifies to `q_ref === q_dut`. This simplified check is used for error counting and queue comparison.\n- **First Mismatch Display:** A flag (`first_mismatch_logged`) ensures the detailed queue dump (showing the last 10 cycles, including status for each cycle) only executes upon the *first* mismatch, as required. The display format follows the example provided, showing Cycle number, Reset, Input (Hex/Bin), Got Output (Hex/Bin), and Expected Output (Hex/Bin).\n- **Error Counting Preservation:** The original logic for `stats1.errors` and `stats1.errors_q` is preserved and updated alongside the queue operations.\n- **Finalization:** The original `final` block is replaced with the mandated summary: printing \"SIMULATION PASSED\" or \"SIMULATION FAILED - x MISMATCHES DETECTED, FIRST AT TIME y\" based on the final state of `stats1.errors_q`.\n\n**3. Syntax Advice:**\n- Consistent use of `logic` for all signals in the testbench is maintained.\n- Placeholder modules (`stimulus_gen`, `RefModule`) are necessary to make the testbench compile and maintain the exact instantiation structure of the golden testbench.\n- The queue display logic iterates correctly and uses formatting commands (`%h`, `%b`) to satisfy the multi-bit display requirement.",
    "interface": "module TopModule (\n    input  clk,\n    input  d,\n    input  r,\n    output q\n);\nendmodule\n",
    "testbench": "`timescale 1 ps/1 ps\n`define OK 12\n`define INCORRECT 13\n\n// --- Placeholder Modules to satisfy golden testbench structure ---\n\n// Placeholder for stimulus_gen (as provided)\nmodule stimulus_gen (\n\tinput clk,\n\toutput logic d, r\n);\n\tinitial begin\n\t\trepeat(100) @(posedge clk, negedge clk) begin\n\t\t\t{d,r} <= $random;\n\t\tend\n\t\t#1 $finish;\n\tend\nendmodule\n\n// Placeholder for RefModule (Required by golden testbench)\nmodule RefModule (\n\tinput clk,\n\tinput d,\n\tinput r,\n\toutput logic q\n);\n\t// Simple DFF model for reference\n\tlogic q_ref_internal;\n\talways @(posedge clk)\n\t\tif (r) \n\t\t\tq_ref_internal <= 1'b0;\n\t\telse\n\t\t\tq_ref_internal <= d;\n\tend\n\tassign q = q_ref_internal;\nendmodule\n\n// --- Module Under Test (TopModule) ---\nmodule TopModule (\n    input  clk,\n    input  d,\n    input  r,\n    output q\n);\n    logic q_next;\n    always @(posedge clk)\n    begin\n        if (r) begin\n            q_next <= 1'b0;\n        end else begin\n            q_next <= d;\n        end\n    end\n    assign q = q_next;\nendmodule\n\n// =======================================================================\n// IMPROVED GOLDEN TESTBENCH\n// =======================================================================\n\nmodule tb();\n\n    // --- Statistics Structure (Maintained from Golden TB) ---\n    typedef struct packed {\n        int errors;\n        int errortime;\n        int errors_q; // Tracking specific queue errors\n        int errortime_q;\n        int clocks;\n    } stats;\n    \n    stats stats1;\n    \n    // --- Signal Wires/Registers (Maintained from Golden TB) ---\n    wire[511:0] wavedrom_title;\n    wire wavedrom_enable;\n    int wavedrom_hide_after_time;\n    \n    reg clk=0;\n    initial forever\n        #5 clk = ~clk;\n\n    logic d;\n    logic r;\n    logic q_ref;\n    logic q_dut;\n\n    wire tb_match;\n    wire tb_mismatch = ~tb_match;\n\n    // --- Queueing for Sequential Logic Mismatch Display ---\n    // Inputs queue: {d, r} (2 bits)\n    logic [1:0] input_data;\n    reg [1:0] input_queue [$];\n\n    // Got output queue: q_dut (1 bit)\n    reg [0:0] got_output_queue [$];\n\n    // Golden output queue: q_ref (1 bit)\n    reg [0:0] golden_queue [$];\n    \n    // Reset context queue (using 'r' signal value)\n    reg [0:0] reset_queue [$];\n\n    localparam MAX_QUEUE_SIZE = 10;\n    \n    // Flag to ensure detailed queue logging only happens once at the FIRST mismatch\n    reg first_mismatch_logged = 0;\n\n    // --- Initialization ---\n    initial begin \n        $dumpfile(\"wave.vcd\");\n        $dumpvars(1, tb, clk,d,r,q_ref,q_dut,tb_mismatch);\n    end\n\n    // --- Instantiations (Maintained from Golden TB) ---\n    stimulus_gen stim1 (\n        .clk, \n        .d, \n        .r\n    );\n    \n    RefModule good1 (\n        .clk,\n        .d,\n        .r,\n        .q(q_ref)\n    );\n        \n    TopModule top_module1 (\n        .clk,\n        .d,\n        .r,\n        .q(q_dut)\n    );\n\n    // --- Tasks (Maintained from Golden TB) ---\n    bit strobe = 0;\n    task wait_for_end_of_timestep;\n        repeat(5) begin\n            strobe <= !strobe;  // Try to delay until the very end of the time step.\n            @(strobe);\n        end\n    endtask\n\n    // --- Verification Logic (Simplified from Golden TB) ---\n    // The original logic: ( { q_ref } === ( { q_ref } ^ { q_dut } ^ { q_ref } ) ) simplifies to (q_ref === q_dut)\n    assign tb_match = (q_ref === q_dut);\n    \n    // --- Clocked Logic Block: Queueing, Mismatch Detection, and Logging ---\n    always @(posedge clk, negedge clk) begin\n        stats1.clocks++;\n        \n        // 1. Queue Management (FIFO behavior)\n        if (input_queue.size() >= MAX_QUEUE_SIZE - 1) begin\n            input_queue.delete(0);\n            got_output_queue.delete(0);\n            golden_queue.delete(0);\n            reset_queue.delete(0);\n        end\n\n        // Store current values\n        input_data = {d, r};\n        input_queue.push_back(input_data);\n        got_output_queue.push_back(q_dut);\n        golden_queue.push_back(q_ref);\n        reset_queue.push_back(r); // Storing 'r' as the context/reset signal\n\n        // 2. Error Counting (Maintained from Golden TB)\n        if (!tb_match) begin\n            if (stats1.errors == 0) stats1.errortime = $time;\n            stats1.errors++;\n        end\n        \n        // Original golden TB error tracking (using q_ref !== q_dut as the trigger)\n        if (q_ref !== q_dut) \n        begin \n            if (stats1.errors_q == 0) stats1.errortime_q = $time;\n            stats1.errors_q = stats1.errors_q + 1'b1; \n        end\n\n        // 3. Detailed Mismatch Logging (New Requirement: Execute only on FIRST mismatch)\n        if (!tb_match && !first_mismatch_logged) begin\n            $display(\"========================================================================\");\n            $display(\"*** FIRST MISMATCH DETECTED AT TIME %0t ***", 
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             ");\n            $display(\"--- Queue-based simulation mismatch display ---\");\n            $display(\"Mismatch detected at time %0t\", $time);\n            $display(\"\\nLast %0d cycles of simulation (Max Queue Size: %0d):\", input_queue.size(), MAX_QUEUE_SIZE);\n\n            // Display Queue Content\n            for (int i = 0; i < input_queue.size(); i++) begin\n                // Check for match status for this specific cycle in the queue\n                logic match_status = (golden_queue[i] === got_output_queue[i]);\n                \n                if (match_status) begin\n                    $display(\"Cycle %0d: Match\", i);\n                end else begin\n                    $display(\"Cycle %0d: MISMATCH\", i);\n                end\n\n                // Display format requirement: HEX and BINARY if <= 64 bits\n                $display(\"  Cycle %0d | Reset: %b | Input: %h (%b) | Got Output: %h (%b) | Exp Output: %h (%b)\",\n                    i,\n                    reset_queue[i],\n                    input_queue[i], input_queue[i], \n                    got_output_queue[i], got_output_queue[i], \n                    golden_queue[i], golden_queue[i]);\n            end\n            $display(\"========================================================================\");\n            first_mismatch_logged = 1;\n        end\n    end\n\n    // --- Finalization Block (Replaced with required summary) ---\n    final begin\n        if (stats1.errors_q > 0) begin\n            $display(\"SIMULATION FAILED - %0d MISMATCHES DETECTED, FIRST AT TIME %0d\", stats1.errors_q, stats1.errortime_q);\n        end else begin\n            $display(\"SIMULATION PASSED\");\n        end\n        $display(\"Simulation finished at %0d ps\", $time);\n    end\n    \n    // --- Timeout ---\n    initial begin\n      #1000000\n      if (!first_mismatch_logged) begin\n          $display(\"TIMEOUT (No Mismatch Detected)\");\n      end\n      $finish();\n    end\n\nendmodule"

Queue Management (FIFO behavior)\n        if (input_queue.size() >= MAX_QUEUE_SIZE - 1) begin\n            input_queue.delete(0);\n            got_output_queue.delete(0);\n            golden_queue.delete(0);\n            reset_queue.delete(0);\n        end\n\n        // Store current values\n        input_data = {d, r};\n        input_queue.push_back(input_data);\n        got_output_queue.push_back(q_dut);\n        golden_queue.push_back(q_ref);\n        reset_queue.push_back(r); // Storing 'r' as the context/reset signal\n\n        // 2. Detailed Mismatch Logging (New Requirement: Execute only on FIRST mismatch)\n        if (!tb_match && !first_mismatch_logged) begin\n            $display(\"========================================================================\");\n            $display(\"*** FIRST MISMATCH DETECTED AT TIME %0t ***",

i < input_queue.size(); i++) begin\n                // Check for match status for this specific cycle in the queue\n                logic match_status = (golden_queue[i] === got_output_queue[i]);\n                \n                if (match_status) begin\n                    $display(\"Cycle %0d: Match\", i);\n                end else begin\n                    $display(\"Cycle %0d: MISMATCH\", i);\n                end\n\n                // Display format requirement: HEX and BINARY if <= 64 bits\n                $display(\"  Cycle %0d | Reset: %b | Input: %h (%b) | Got Output: %h (%b) | Exp Output: %h (%b)\",\n                    i,\n                    reset_queue[i],\n                    input_queue[i], input_queue[i], \n                    got_output_queue[i], got_output_queue[i], \n                    golden_queue[i], golden_queue[i]);\n            end\n            $display(\"========================================================================\");\n            first_mismatch_logged = 1;\n        end\n    end\n\n    // --- Finalization Block (Replaced with required summary) ---\n    final begin\n        if (stats1.errors_q > 0) begin\n            $display(\"SIMULATION FAILED - %0d MISMATCHES DETECTED, FIRST AT TIME %0d\", stats1.errors_q, stats1.errortime_q);\n        end else begin\n            $display(\"SIMULATION PASSED\");\n        end\n        $display(\"Simulation finished at %0d ps\", $time);\n    end\n    \n    // --- Timeout ---\n    initial begin\n      #1000000\n      if (!first_mismatch_logged) begin\n          $display(\"TIMEOUT (No Mismatch Detected)\");\n      end\n      $finish();\n    end\n\nendmodule"
